title: Protocol for a scoping review
author: JC
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the study protocol for a scoping review of the publications on the development, validation and use of artificial intelligence technologies designed to evaluate basic motor skills in children.
steps_raw: This is the study protocol for a scoping review of the publications on the development, validation and use of artificial intelligence technologies designed to evaluate basic motor skills in children.
